metadata.name: Apply a Customer Payment with Remittance Advice

description: A payment has been received from a customer via ACH, and the customer has sent a separate email with remittance advice detailing which invoices the payment covers.

nodes.task_description: Identify the incoming payment in the bank statement and the corresponding remittance advice.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly matches the payment amount with the remittance advice.

nodes.task_description: Apply the single payment against the multiple open invoices specified in the remittance advice.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully applies the cash and closes all specified invoices.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the customer's account balance reflects the payment and there is no unapplied cash remaining.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the customer's account is updated and the payment is fully applied.
